notes:
Tested with SD client so far, as amdgpu-pro with vulcan is not supported yet on LM19.1. 

Launcher starts and game started often but had crashes several times.
First crash was at starting game while I changed localization to other than EN, so I only use EN for now. 
Game started for me with 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=2 PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=3 PROTON_LOG=4 %command%' startup option. Changed settings and started PvE game...crash on battle queue, while AW was still active. Had to do a full restart, which I recommand for any new attempt, otherwise you'll get crash before login. Obviously the Proton/Wine wrapper uses Windows XP, as I found out by viewing crash log. Probably there is an option to change this toward Windows 7 or 10 I do not know yet.
Well, SMAA doesn't work for me in any version. With disabled AA I can join Alabino booting camp, probably also some battles, which isn't usefull until it runs more stable. But this time it crashed for me on leaving battle. It seems I need to get amdgpu-pro graphic drivers with vulcan running and/or have to fix settings to fit more toward my openGL surrounding.
title: Armored Warfare

gpu: ATI Technologies Inc. AMD Radeon RX 480
notes:
After managing to install AMDgpu with Vulkan support on my Linux Mint system, I was able to change from OpenGL with major upgrade in graphic details settings. No need to tweak any longer, game starts and runs like native with HD client. 

There are some issues, like really annoying command and movement delay, which also had been with OpenGL, so I guess it is the Proton wrapper to cause it. Informations have to be catched up and be processed by Wine/Proton before they are sent, which causes minor delay. Sometimes game hangs on exit, but not very often. So, the game is playable with the given delay issue, which makes fast vehicles no real fun at the moment, but it's totally playable with standard tanks.
title: Armored Warfare

notes: Launcher and game starts without any tweaks with Proton 4.2-5. But the game freezes if I move the mouse, and continues to run as soon as I stop moving the mouse. In window mode the game freezes only when the mouse moves over the game window. If I hold a mouse button while moving the mouse, the game does not freeze. Disabling Esync and D3d11, or using Wind D3d11, doesn't help.
title: Armored Warfare

notes: Installed and ran perfectly with no tweaking. Both Coop and PvP battles worked. If you have a my.com account you want to use instead of steam just rename steam_api.dll in the game folder to something else.
title: Armored Warfare

notes: It uses the my.com application to launch the game. Complained that the needed rights are not available to install crucial components. Tried to launch the game from their launcher and just got stuck there.
title: Armored Warfare
